text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Hanshin J.F. has finally arrived. This huge
stage will be Mejiro Dober's first G1 race, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...All right.
choice_data_list: You don't seem nervous at all.
You don't seem nervous at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Are you saying I should be? Well, I am a little surprised at how calm I am.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I'm a little surprised by how calm I feel.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I want to do well today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I want to do well today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well enough to believe that I actually stand a
chance in the Tiara tour!
choice_data_list: You have your promise with Bright to keep.
You have your promise with Bright to keep.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eyes aglow with determination, she seems to be
shaking more out of excitement than anxiety.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm sure she's going to do great out there!
choice_data_list: Get out there and bring home the win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't need you telling me to do that. Anyway,
I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I will. See you soon!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Prepare to be dazzled, everyone! I'll show you
shining brilliance like you've never seen before!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Prepare to be dazzled, everyone! I'll show you
shining brilliance like you've never seen before!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wow... It's hard to believe this is Pearl's first big
race too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I guess that's no surprise coming from someone
who's always boasting that the world is her
oyster.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I can't lose out to her in spirit, though! I'm going
to put myself out there and be just as bold!)

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I like the look in your eyes, Dober. Filled
with determination and competitive spirit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pearl...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
What a splendid day to pit our budding
potentials against each other. It's nearly
showtime!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to give this race everything I've got,
and I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're about to step up to the gate for the
Hanshin J.F.! Who will emerge as the junior
Goddess?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Those cheers... So this is what a G1 feels like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I can't stop shaking... The track feels even bigger
than usual.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(The soles of my feet feel strangely hot too, like
they're absorbing heat from the turf.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'll be okay. It'll all be okay.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm calm. I can do this. I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I can run!
